title: Zero Carbon Charge Secures R100 Million Investment from DBSA
content: Zero Carbon Charge (CHARGE), South Africaâ€™s first company to pioneer a national network of off-grid, solar-powered ultra-fast electric vehicle (EV) charging station, received a R100 million equity investment from the Development Bank of Southern Africa (DBSA). The funding will enable the rollout of CHARGEâ€™s ultra-fast charging stations every 150 km along all national roads. Each site is fully off-grid, powered by solar energy and supported by battery storageâ€”eliminating reliance on Eskom, and addressing range anxiety for EV drivers across the country.
author: Analysts Account
